skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: AI-powered video creation agent that produces short videos (5-120 seconds) from text descriptions and uploaded media.
skill.summary: Professional video production agent handling scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music for product ads, social content, and brand videos.
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged 534 patterns across 13 files, but evaluation confirms these are FALSE POSITIVES. The skill is a legitimate CLI tool for the Pexo AI video platform. Shell command substitution patterns are standard bash scripting for API calls to pexo.ai. Environment variable access (PEXO_API_KEY, PEXO_BASE_URL) is documented authentication. Filesystem access targets the skill's own config directory (~/.pexo/). Network calls go exclusively to the official Pexo API. No malicious patterns, credential exfiltration, or command injection vectors detected.

low_findings.title: API Key Required in Configuration
low_findings.description: The skill requires PEXO_API_KEY to be stored in ~/.pexo/config file. This is documented and expected for API authentication, but users should ensure proper file permissions on the config file.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Clear documentation of required API key storage - standard practice but worth noting for security awareness.

low_findings.title: External API Dependencies
low_findings.description: All functionality depends on external Pexo API endpoints (pexo.ai). Network calls use hardcoded URLs which is appropriate for a dedicated API client but means the skill cannot function offline.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: All network calls target pexo.ai domain - expected behavior for an API client skill.

content.user_title: Create AI videos from text descriptions
content.value_statement: Pexo handles professional video production including scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music selection. Simply describe your video idea and receive a polished 5-120 second video in 15-20 minutes.
actual_capabilities: Generate 5-120 second videos from text descriptions in 16:9, 9:16, or 1:1 aspect ratios
Process uploaded images (jpg, png, webp, bmp, tiff, heic), videos (mp4, mov, avi), and audio files
Handle scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music selection automatically
Provide preview options for user selection before final rendering
Support iterative revisions on existing video projects
Manage credit-based usage with balance tracking and purchase links
limitations: Cannot crawl web URLs - users must download and upload files manually
Requires Pexo API key and account credits to function
Video production takes 15-20 minutes for short videos, longer for complex content
Does not support real-time video editing or live streaming capabilities

use_cases.title: E-commerce Product Videos
use_cases.description: Create engaging product showcase videos for online stores. Upload product photos and receive professional promotional clips optimized for product pages and social advertising.
use_cases.target_user: E-commerce sellers and small business owners

use_cases.title: Social Media Content Creation
use_cases.description: Generate TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts content from simple text prompts. Perfect for content creators needing consistent video output without editing skills.
use_cases.target_user: Social media influencers and content marketers

use_cases.title: Corporate Training and Explainer Videos
use_cases.description: Produce internal training materials, product explainers, and corporate communications. Upload presentations or documents and convert them into engaging video content.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Product Video
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 15-second product video for running shoes. Show the shoes from multiple angles with upbeat music.

prompt_templates.title: Brand Story Video
prompt_templates.prompt: Make a 30-second brand story video for our eco-friendly skincare line. Include natural imagery, soft transitions, and calming background music. Target audience is women aged 25-40.
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate - includes brand positioning and target audience

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Asset Product Launch
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 45-second product launch video using the uploaded product photos, logo, and demo video clips. Start with a hook showing the problem, then introduce our solution, end with call-to-action. Add text overlays for key features.
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced - combines multiple uploaded assets with specific narrative structure

prompt_templates.title: Social Media Variation Set
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate three video variations from the same content: one 9:16 for TikTok, one 1:1 for Instagram feed, and one 16:9 for YouTube. Keep the core message but adjust pacing for each platform's audience expectations.
prompt_templates.scenario: Expert - multi-format output with platform-specific optimization

output_examples.input: Create a 15-second video showcasing our new coffee maker with modern design and quick brewing.
output: Video production submitted - estimated completion: 15-20 minutes
Final video delivered: 15-second product showcase with rotating shots of the coffee maker, steam effects, and pouring sequence set to upbeat jazz music

output_examples.input: Make a TikTok video for our restaurant's new summer menu using the uploaded food photos.
output: Preview options available: Style A (fast cuts), Style B (smooth transitions), Style C (cinematic)
Final video: 9:16 vertical format with quick cuts between dishes, text overlays showing dish names, trending audio track

best_practices: Provide specific details about video style, target audience, and desired mood for better results
Upload high-quality images and videos - output quality depends on input quality
Use the preview selection feature to choose the best style before final rendering
Consolidate all requirements into one message to minimize token usage and production iterations
anti_patterns: Do not add your own creative interpretations - Pexo's backend specializes in video production
Do not call pexo-chat.sh during WAIT state - this triggers duplicate video production
Do not send bare asset IDs without wrapping in proper tags like <original-image>asset_id</original-image>
Do not truncate video URLs when sharing - include all query parameters to avoid 403 errors

faq.question: What video formats and lengths does Pexo support?
faq.answer: Pexo creates videos from 5 to 120 seconds in three aspect ratios: 16:9 (landscape), 9:16 (vertical for TikTok/Reels), and 1:1 (square). Production typically takes 15-20 minutes for short videos.

faq.question: What file types can I upload for video creation?
faq.answer: Images: jpg, jpeg, png, webp, bmp, tiff, heic, heif. Videos: mp4, mov, avi. Audio: mp3, wav, aac, m4a, ogg, flac. Maximum file sizes depend on your Pexo plan.

faq.question: How do I handle insufficient credits errors?
faq.answer: When credits run low, the skill displays your balance and provides a purchase link. Visit https://pexo.ai/home, click Credits (top-right), then Buy Credits. After purchasing, retry the failed step.

faq.question: Can Pexo crawl videos from web URLs I provide?
faq.answer: No, Pexo cannot crawl external URLs. You must download files from web URLs first, then upload them using the pexo-upload.sh script. The skill will provide the asset ID to reference in your message.

faq.question: How do I request revisions to a completed video?
faq.answer: Use the same project_id from your original video and send feedback via pexo-chat.sh with your revision requests. The skill handles revisions without creating a new project.

faq.question: What happens if video production takes longer than expected?
faq.answer: If polling exceeds 30 minutes with WAIT status, the skill notifies you with the project link and help guide. You can choose to continue waiting or restart the production process.
